original: shield disruptor

original: a shield disruptor
context: <<POS:07555132>> e.description='a shield disruptor'

original:
This module houses a cornucopia of electronic warfare tools capable of sabotaging enemy shield generators. Whether by use of firmware-crashing cryptoworms or projector-confusing magnetic fields, this shield disruptor provides a once-per-combat attempt to play havoc with your enemy’s defenses, after which its one-use, burst-transmitting system will need maintenance to fire again.

(1x per fight)
(+5 Systems)
context: <<POS:07555163>> e.tooltip='This module houses a cornucopia of electronic warfare tools '
